name: 吃羊肉爐長高的我
description: 以反擊酸民嫌貴為開頭，透過千元挑戰展示品牌產品豐富度，最終以幽默的長高梗收尾。

narrative.structure: 起：千元鈔挑戰；承：快速抓取產品；轉：計算總價與禮盒展示；合：品牌理念與長高梗幽默結尾。
narrative.summary: 主持人利用1000元預算展示在雅方能買到的大量冷凍食品，反擊價格昂貴的質疑，並分享吃羊肉爐會長高的個人趣味說法。

hook.description: 打臉臭酸民：挑戰1000元能買多少東西

structure.action: {character} holds a thousand-dollar bill and speaks to the camera in {scene}

structure.purpose: Verify the value and price points

structure.action: Speed ramp of more {product} filling the table
structure.purpose: Visual proof of extreme high CP value

structure.action: {character} calculates total cost with a teammate in {scene}

structure.purpose: Upsell premium options and gift usage

structure.action: {character} tells a funny story about growing tall after eating {product} with {emotion}
structure.purpose: Create a memorable twist and increase engagement

visualFlow.rhythmPattern: Intro dialogue followed by rapid percussive cutting for product selection

promptTemplate.base: High-quality short video aesthetic, {style} style, vibrant colors, clear product labels.
perShot: {character} with {emotion} expression holding money in {scene}, {style} style.
Handheld POV picking up {product} in a {scene} with {style}.
Top-down view of many {product} appearing rapidly, {style}.
Wide shot of {character} talking to someone in {scene}, {style}.
{character} smiling and telling a joke in {scene}, {style} style.

useCase: E-commerce promotion and brand image building

source.title: 吃羊肉爐長高的我_雅方國際

analysis.whyItWorks: Uses a common social media trope (debunking comments) to provide high informational value (pricing) wrapped in entertainment.
analysis.targetAudience: Housewives, budget shoppers, and young people looking for quick meal solutions.
